welcome_subtitle: Ask us anything about membership, courses or the community.
bot_greeting: Welcome to Abibitumi! I can answer common questions or connect you with a person.
bot_fallback: Let me connect you with a team member.

bot_flows.label: Membership & pricing
bot_flows.answer: You can view all membership options on our Join page. Would you like the link, or should I connect you with someone?

bot_flows.label: Courses & classes
bot_flows.answer: We offer live and self-paced classes in Twi and other African languages. Tell me which language or topic interests you.

bot_flows.label: Account & login
bot_flows.answer: For login or account issues, make sure you are using the phone number registered to your account. I can connect you with support if you are still stuck.
